Configuration.name: CerberusLibrary
Configuration.Description: This is the global CerberusLogic macro library

entry.value: Attribute( "timebucket" ) .when( "created:format(${%yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm})", ge( "created", ref( ":now(-120m)" ) ) ) .when( "created:format(${%yyyy-MM-dd HH})", ge( "created", ref( ":now(-48h)" ) ) ) .when( "created:format(${%yyyy-MM-dd})", ge( "created", ref( ":now(-10d)" ) ) ) .when( "created:format(${%yyyy-MM})", ge( "created", ref( ":now(-3M)" ) ) ) .when( "created:format(${%yyyy})" )
Compute a synthetic ‘timebucket’ attribute from the object’s ‘created’ timestamp, producing a string whose precision adapts to the age of the timestamp
This is a groups postprocessing level action to transform a mapping of status strings to counts into their sum, color styled by the percentage of the 'Success' counts, with the details as popup
This is a groups postprocessing level action to transform a list into its size with the contents as popup
This is a groups postprocessing level action to transform a mapping of numbers into their sum with the details as popup
This is a groups postprocessing level action to transform a two-level mapping of numbers into their sum with the details grid as popup
This is a groups postprocessing level action to filter out from a two-level mapping representing a matrix all entries that represent cells which are alone in their row and column
